Name: FPrimaryAssetRules
Description: Structure defining rules for what to do with assets, this is defined per type and can be overridden per asset

Variables.Name: Priority
Variables.Description: Primary Assets with a higher priority will take precedence over lower priorities when assigning management for referenced assets. If priorities match, both will manage the same Secondary Asset.

Variables.Name: bApplyRecursively
Variables.Description: If true, this rule will apply to all referenced Secondary Assets recursively, as long as they are not managed by a higher-priority Primary Asset.

Variables.Name: ChunkId
Variables.Description: Assets will be put into this Chunk ID specifically, if set to something other than -1. The default Chunk is Chunk 0.

Variables.Name: CookRule
Variables.Description: Rule describing when this asset should be cooked.
